logo_brief.style: Wordmark with icon — clean, geometric, professional. No gradients on the mark. Flat vector with solid fills only.
logo_brief.concept: A minimal waveform or sound bar abstraction fused into or beside the word VOCA. The icon should feel like it could stand alone as an app icon.

icon_options.description: Five vertical bars of varying heights forming a waveform, left-aligned. The middle bar is tallest. Bars are rounded at the top. Simple, timeless, instantly communicates 'audio'.
The letter V stylized as two converging audio waveform bars meeting at a point, forming a negative-space V shape. Abstract but legible.
A minimal speech bubble outline with a single waveform line inside it, symbolizing 'voice into text/context'.

wordmark.font_style: Geometric sans-serif, heavy weight, tight letter-spacing (-0.03em). Think similar to Syne ExtraBold or Neue Haas Grotesk Display. All caps or title case both acceptable.
wordmark.icon_position: Left of wordmark, vertically centered, small gap

60_base.name: Deep Forest
60_base.usage: Primary backgrounds, dark surfaces, main brand color

10_accent.name: Electric Mint
10_accent.usage: CTAs, highlights, hover states, checkmarks, brand accents. Use sparingly.

neutral_mid.name: Forest Mist
neutral_mid.usage: Hover states on dark backgrounds, subtle surfaces

icon_only.usage: App icon, favicon, social media profile picture

image_generation_prompt.prompt: Minimal flat vector logo for a tech product called VOCA. Icon: five rounded vertical bars forming an audio waveform, bars varying in height (short, medium, tall, medium, short), color #4ade80 electric mint green on dark background #0d2218. Wordmark 'VOCA' in bold geometric sans-serif to the right of the icon, color white/off-white. No gradients. No shadows. No decorative elements. Clean, professional, startup aesthetic. SVG-style flat design. White background version and dark background version side by side.
image_generation_prompt.negative_prompt: gradients, 3D effects, drop shadows, ornate details, serif fonts, script fonts, complex illustrations, abstract art, photorealistic elements, rainbow colors, neon glow effects
image_generation_prompt.aspect_ratio: 16:9 for concept sheet, 1:1 for icon version
image_generation_prompt.style_references: Linear app logo, Vercel logo, Supabase logo — minimal geometric mark + clean wordmark

body.usage: UI text, labels, body copy, buttons

mono.usage: Code snippets, JSON export, transcript raw output

do_not: Use purple, blue, or orange as the accent color
Use rounded bubbly fonts (Nunito, Poppins, Quicksand)
Add gradients to the logo mark
Use icons that resemble microphones (too generic)
Design anything that looks like a podcast app or transcription SaaS from 2018
